data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: All data transferred between users and the site is encrypted with SSL/TLS protocols.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Adobe partners with cybersecurity firms to detect and mitigate advanced threats.

data.title: User Authentication and Access Control
data.description: Multi-factor authentication is employed to ensure secure user access to accounts.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Regular audits and penetration testing are conducted to uncover potential vulnerabilities.

data.title: Data Leak Prevention
data.description: Technology to prevent unauthorized data access is implemented across the platform.
